title: M29Ghpwmwa0Kza1Jkk1Sheee0Mtjt9
summary:
Main
Looking ahead, recent high-frequency indicators suggest that the recovery of global trade has persisted into early 2024, albeit with fragility and a strong reliance on the performance of key economies such as the United States and China. By Michalis Voutsinas
The first trading week of May a couple of years ago was a rather choppy one, with Federal Reserve making headlines. In fact, Fed raised the target for the Fed Funds Rate by half a point to 0.75-1 percent - aiming to tackle soaring inflation.
